name: PATRICK INDUSTRIES INC
summary: PART I Unless the context otherwise requires, the terms Company, Patrick, we, our, or us refer to Patrick Industries, Inc. and its subsidiaries. Company Overview Patrick is a leading component solutions provider for the recreational vehicle ("RV"), marine, powersports, manufactured housing ("MH") and various industrial markets including single and multi-family housing, hospitality, institutional and commercial markets.
